---
title: "ravens_harness.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/ravens_harness.py"
loc: 129
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.47
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 6.67
overall_score: 4.69
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating RavensHarness, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import RavensHarness and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 61 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [signal](file://signal)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.edda](file://src.sentinel.wardens.edda)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster](file://src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie](file://src.sentinel.wardens.valkyrie)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.freya](file://src.sentinel.wardens.freya)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.huginn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.huginn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.taste](file://src.sentinel.wardens.taste)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.shadow_forge](file://src.sentinel.wardens.shadow_forge)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `RavensHarness`
- `__init__`
- `start_bridge`
- `start_pennyone`
- `stop_all`
- `run`
- `_save_results`
- `_print_summary`
